name: ResourceInstance
description: Document model for an instantiated resource. Represents a customer's configured resource instance based on template and facet selections.

global.schema:
type ResourceInstanceState {
    resourceTemplateId: PHID
    customerId: PHID
    customerName: String
    templateName: String
    thumbnailUrl: URL
    infoLink: URL
    description: String
    operatorProfile: OperatorProfile
    status: InstanceStatus!
    configuration: [InstanceFacet!]!
    confirmedAt: DateTime
    provisioningStartedAt: DateTime
    provisioningCompletedAt: DateTime
    provisioningFailureReason: String
    activatedAt: DateTime
    suspendedAt: DateTime
    suspensionType: SuspensionType
    suspensionReason: String
    suspensionDetails: String
    resumedAt: DateTime
    terminatedAt: DateTime
    terminationReason: String
}

type OperatorProfile {
    id: PHID!
    operatorName: String
}

enum InstanceStatus {
    DRAFT
    PROVISIONING
    ACTIVE
    SUSPENDED
    TERMINATED
}

enum SuspensionType {
    NON_PAYMENT
    MAINTENANCE
    OTHER
}

type InstanceFacet {
    id: OID!
    categoryKey: String!
    categoryLabel: String!
    selectedOption: String!
}
global.initialValue:
{
  "resourceTemplateId": null,
  "customerId": null,
  "customerName": null,
  "templateName": null,
  "thumbnailUrl": null,
  "infoLink": null,
  "description": null,
  "operatorProfile": null,
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "configuration": [],
  "confirmedAt": null,
  "provisioningStartedAt": null,
  "provisioningCompletedAt": null,
  "provisioningFailureReason": null,
  "activatedAt": null,
  "suspendedAt": null,
  "suspensionType": null,
  "suspensionReason": null,
  "suspensionDetails": null,
  "resumedAt": null,
  "terminatedAt": null,
  "terminationReason": null
}

modules.name: Instance Management

operations.name: INITIALIZE_INSTANCE
operations.schema:
input InitializeInstanceInput {
    operatorId: PHID!
    operatorDocumentType: String!
    resourceTemplateId: PHID
    customerId: PHID
    customerName: String
    templateName: String
    operatorName: String
    thumbnailUrl: URL
    infoLink: URL
    description: String
}

operations.name: UPDATE_INSTANCE_INFO
SET_OPERATOR_PROFILE
operations.description: Sets the operator profile reference for this resource instance

operations.name: CONFIRM_INSTANCE

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError
errors.description: Can only confirm instances in DRAFT status

operations.template: Confirms the instance configuration and moves to provisioning
operations.description: Confirms the instance configuration and moves to provisioning

operations.name: REPORT_PROVISIONING_STARTED

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionReportProvisioningStartedError
errors.description: Can only report provisioning started for instances in PROVISIONING status

operations.name: REPORT_PROVISIONING_COMPLETED

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionReportProvisioningCompletedError
errors.description: Can only report provisioning completed for instances in PROVISIONING status

operations.template: Reports that provisioning has completed successfully
operations.description: Reports that provisioning has completed successfully

operations.name: REPORT_PROVISIONING_FAILED

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionReportProvisioningFailedError
errors.description: Can only report provisioning failed for instances in PROVISIONING status

operations.name: ACTIVATE_INSTANCE

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionActivateInstanceError
errors.description: Can only activate instances in PROVISIONING status

errors.name: ProvisioningNotCompletedError
errors.description: Must report provisioning completed before activating

operations.name: SUSPEND_FOR_NON_PAYMENT
operations.template: Suspends an active instance due to non-payment
operations.description: Suspends an active instance due to non-payment

operations.name: SUSPEND_FOR_MAINTENANCE
operations.template: Suspends an active instance for maintenance
operations.description: Suspends an active instance for maintenance

operations.name: RESUME_AFTER_PAYMENT

errors.name: InvalidSuspensionTypeError
errors.description: This operation is for NON_PAYMENT suspensions only

operations.template: Resumes a suspended instance after payment received
operations.description: Resumes a suspended instance after payment received

operations.name: RESUME_AFTER_MAINTENANCE

errors.name: InvalidSuspensionTypeResumeAfterMaintenanceError
errors.description: This operation is for MAINTENANCE suspensions only

operations.template: Resumes a suspended instance after maintenance completed
operations.description: Resumes a suspended instance after maintenance completed

operations.name: SUSPEND_INSTANCE
operations.template: Suspends the resource instance (deprecated - use specific suspension operations)
operations.description: Suspends the resource instance (deprecated - use specific suspension operations)

operations.name: TERMINATE_INSTANCE

errors.name: AlreadyTerminatedError
errors.description: Instance is already terminated and cannot be terminated again

modules.description: Operations for managing resource instance lifecycle

modules.name: Configuration Management

operations.name: SET_INSTANCE_FACET

errors.name: ConfigurationLockedError
errors.description: Cannot modify configuration while instance is ACTIVE

operations.template: Sets a facet selection for the instance
operations.description: Sets a facet selection for the instance

operations.name: REMOVE_INSTANCE_FACET

errors.name: ConfigurationLockedRemoveInstanceFacetError
errors.description: Cannot modify configuration while instance is ACTIVE

operations.template: Removes a facet selection from the instance
operations.description: Removes a facet selection from the instance

operations.name: UPDATE_INSTANCE_FACET

errors.name: ConfigurationLockedUpdateInstanceFacetError
errors.description: Cannot modify configuration while instance is ACTIVE

operations.name: APPLY_CONFIGURATION_CHANGES

errors.name: ConfigurationLockedApplyConfigurationChangesError
errors.description: Cannot modify configuration while instance is ACTIVE. Suspend the instance first.

operations.schema:
input ApplyConfigurationChangesInput {
    appliedAt: DateTime!
    changeDescription: String
    addFacets: [SetInstanceFacetInput!]
    updateFacets: [UpdateInstanceFacetInput!]
    removeFacetKeys: [String!]
}
operations.template: Applies multiple configuration changes in one operation
operations.description: Applies multiple configuration changes in one operation

modules.description: Operations for managing instance facet configuration
